prompt: A timeline of money leaving my account soon: upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date with the total going out.
wire:
export default function OutflowTimeline() { const [scheduled, setScheduled] = useState([]); const [recurring, setRecurring] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([ tools.host_listScheduledPayments({}), tools.host_getRecurringInsights({}) ]).then(([sched, rec]) => { setScheduled(sched.data || sched.payments || sched || []); setRecurring(rec.subscriptions || rec.recurring || rec.data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, []); if (loading) { return (
Loading upcoming payments…
); } const today = new Date("2026-07-21"); const schedItems = (Array.isArray(scheduled) ? scheduled : []).map((p) => ({ id: "sched-" + (p.id || p.payeeId || Math.random()), label: p.payeeName || p.name || p.descriptor || "Scheduled payment", amountCents: p.amountCents || p.amount || 0, date: p.scheduledDate || p.date || p.nextDate || null, type: "scheduled", })); const recItems = (Array.isArray(recurring) ? recurring : []).map((r) => ({ id: "rec-" + (r.id || r.merchant || Math.random()), label: r.merchant || r.name || r.descriptor || "Subscription", amountCents: r.amountCents || r.amount || 0, date: r.nextDate || r.nextBillingDate || r.date || null, type: "subscription", })); const allItems = [...schedItems, ...recItems] .filter((item) => item.date) .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date)); const totalCents = allItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.amountCents || 0), 0); const formatMoney = (cents) => { if (!cents && cents !== 0) return "—"; return fmt.money(cents); }; const formatDate = (iso) => { if (!iso) return "—"; const d = new Date(iso); if (isNaN(d)) return "—"; const diff = Math.round((d - today) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); const label = d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" }); if (diff === 0) return `Today · ${label}`; if (diff === 1) return `Tomorrow · ${label}`; if (diff < 0) return label; return `In ${diff}d · ${label}`; }; const typeColor = (type) => type === "subscription" ? "var(--vendo-color-muted)" : "var(--vendo-color-text)"; const typeLabel = (type) => type === "subscription" ? "Subscription" : "Scheduled"; return (
{/* Hero total */}
Total going out
{formatMoney(totalCents)}
{allItems.length} upcoming payment{allItems.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} {schedItems.length > 0 && recItems.length > 0 ? ` · ${schedItems.length} scheduled, ${recItems.length} subscription${recItems.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}` : ""}
{/* Timeline */} {allItems.length === 0 ? (
No upcoming payments found — you're all clear.
) : (
{allItems.map((item, idx) => { const isLast = idx === allItems.length - 1; return (
{item.label} {typeLabel(item.type)}
{formatDate(item.date)}
{formatMoney(item.amountCents)}
); })}
)}
); }
